metadata.description: Comprehensive digital marketing plugin for Claude Code — strategy, SEO, paid ads, content, email, social, PR, analytics, CRO, and agency operations

plugins.name: digital-marketing-pro
plugins.description: Plan, execute, and measure digital marketing across all channels. 25 specialist agents handle strategy, SEO, paid ads, content, email, social, PR, analytics, CRO, and agency operations — with brand voice enforcement, quality evaluation, multilingual support, and persistent campaign memory. v2.6 adds 6 dedicated SEO sub-skills, expanded schema markup support (18 types with deprecation tracking), Google SEO quick reference, and DataForSEO MCP integration.
